${modID}:ExampleCard.NAME: Name
${modID}:ExampleCard.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: This will automatically be used if the card is upgraded. Remove it if unneeded.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: You can put more text in here.
If you need to use it for stuff.
Blizzard is a good example for this.

${modID}:splatRoller.NAME: Splat Roller
${modID}:splatRoller.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! to only the front enemy. Spend 1 ${modID}:Ink

${modID}:splashWall.NAME: Splash Wall
${modID}:splashWall.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. Block is not removed at the start of your next turn

${modID}:mainInkRecovery.NAME: Main ink recovery
${modID}:mainInkRecovery.DESCRIPTION: Gain 2 ${modID}:Ink at the start of your next turn

${modID}:evasiveMovement.NAME: Evasive Movement
${modID}:evasiveMovement.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you play card that either adds or removes ${modID}:Ink, gain 2 Block

${modID}:aggressiveMovement.NAME: Aggressive Movement
${modID}:aggressiveMovement.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you play card that either adds or removes ${modID}:Ink, deal 2 damage to all enemies

${modID}:flowState.NAME: Flow State
${modID}:flowState.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! Damage. Increase all damage Flow State cards by 2 this combat

${modID}:runSpeedUp.NAME: Run Speed Up
${modID}:runSpeedUp.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block and draw a card.

${modID}:coldBlooded.NAME: Cold Blooded
${modID}:coldBlooded.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage and draw a card.

${modID}:preparation.NAME: Preparation
${modID}:preparation.DESCRIPTION: Draw X cards. Gain X [E] + 1. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:unload.NAME: Unload
${modID}:unload.DESCRIPTION: Deals !D! damage on a random enemy ${modID}:Ink times. Spends all ${modID}:Ink.

${modID}:bubbler.NAME: Bubbler
${modID}:bubbler.DESCRIPTION: Prevent the nexy time you would lose HP !M! times.
